test_output_summary: No tests applicable for this task — it is a pure scaffold/file creation task with no executable logic.
implementation_notes: Created all 9 required files as specified. All __init__.py files are empty. The .gitkeep file creates the subjects/gcse-english/ directory structure for git tracking. The .gitignore correctly excludes .env (secrets) while .env.example is tracked. agent.py was intentionally NOT created per task constraints (reserved for TASK-DEB-006).
